name: SLR29
provenance: `B29`/`L29` in the numbering of the DeMeo–Freese–Jipsen manuscript *Representing Finite Lattices as Congruence Lattices of Finite Algebras* (§ 6 of the 2016-06-10 draft, `docs/papers/fin-lat-rep/SmallLatticeReps.tex`).  The dictionary between the manuscript's lattice numbering and this library's names is `docs/notes/flrp-slr-naming.md`.
